items.chinese_summary: 开源 agentic 视频生产编排系统，12 条流水线 + 52 个工具 + 500+ agent skills，把任意 AI 编码助手（Claude Code/Cursor/Cline）变成视频工厂。给自动化内容生产/Marketing 团队用。对比 n8n/Dify 这类通用 agent 平台，它专门为视频链路（脚本→TTS→剪辑→字幕→渲染）做了 skills，比让业务同学自己拼 prompt 稳定得多，但锁定视频这个场景了，泛业务自动化还是 n8n 灵活。上手成本：clone 仓库后按文档挂 MCP 即可，需要 FFmpeg 和至少一个 LLM key。
items.backend_focus: 在团队视频流水线里挑一个最低 ROI 的环节（比如自动字幕+封面），用 OpenMontage 的对应 skill 跑一次端到端，衡量人工节省小时数；同时把 12 条 pipeline 的 YAML 在 staging 跑通，验证 FFmpeg、Whisper、TTS 三个外部依赖的版本锁。

items.title: chopratejas/headroom
items.original_summary: Compress tool outputs, logs, files, and RAG chunks before they reach the LLM. 60-95% fewer tokens, same answers. Library, proxy, MCP server. | 语言: Python | Stars: 43,915 | Forks: 3,054 | 2,617 stars today
items.chinese_summary: LLM 上下文压缩层，Python 库 + 代理 + MCP server 三种形态。给 RAG/Agent 团队解决 token 爆炸痛点，宣传压缩 60-95% token 但保持答案质量。横向比 LangChain 的 ContextualCompressionRetriever 强在支持 logs/工具输出/RAG chunks 全场景，弱在要插入到调用链中间，多一跳延迟。适合 Anthropic/Claude 这种按 token 收费且上下文长的场景；本身 token 就便宜+上下文短的模型（Haiku/GPT-4o-mini）收益小。部署：pip install headroom 或起 proxy，零基础设施改动。
items.backend_focus: pip install headroom，挑你们最贵的那条 RAG 链路（典型是带多文档 + 工具调用的 agent），在 system prompt 前面挂上压缩中间件，ab 测一周对比 token 用量和答案准确率，注意监控首 token 延迟是否恶化。

items.title: tursodatabase/turso
items.original_summary: Turso is an in-process SQL database, compatible with SQLite. | 语言: Rust | Stars: 20,718 | Forks: 1,059 | 543 stars today
items.chinese_summary: Rust 写的进程内 SQLite 兼容数据库，Turso 团队出品。给想拿 SQLite 当嵌入式/服务端库用、又嫌 CGo/绑定麻烦的后端用。关键差异：原版 SQLite 是 C 库要 CGo/FFI，Turso 用 Rust 重写并保留 wire-compatible 协议，部署可以纯 in-process 不起服务，也能跑 libSQL server 模式。跟 libSQL 生态同源（其实 Turso 云就是它），但自己 host 不用上 Turso 托管。对延迟敏感的边缘场景（IoT、edge function）比 Postgres 轻一个量级，缺点是单机写吞吐天花板低于 Postgres。上手：cargo add turso 或 Docker 起 server，零迁移成本。
items.backend_focus: 在你们延迟最敏感的边缘服务或 sidecar 进程里试点，cargo add turso 把 SQLite 调用迁过去压一遍 P99；对分布式/高并发写场景暂时别动，仍然走 Postgres。

items.title: AI-Assisted Migration Tool Helps Teams Move from ingress-nginx to Higress in Minutes
items.original_summary: The Cloud Native Computing Foundation has highlighted a new AI-assisted migration approach that enabled engineers to migrate 60 ingress-nginx resources to Higress in roughly 30 minutes, demonstrating how artificial intelligence is increasingly being applied to modernize Kubernetes networking and gateway infrastructure. By Craig Risi
items.chinese_summary: CNCF 推广一种 AI 辅助迁移方法，可在约 30 分钟内把 60 个 ingress-nginx 资源迁移到 Higress。这是 Kubernetes 网关迁移工具/方法论展示，差异点在于用 LLM 自动转换 Ingress YAML/Annotation。对使用 ingress-nginx 的团队可考虑引入 AI 迁移流程。
items.backend_focus: 可行动项：评估 Higress 替代 ingress-nginx 路线时，试用该 AI 迁移工具生成 PR；目前 Higress 与 ingress-nginx 注解兼容性需逐条核验，建议先在 staging 集群灰度。

items.title: Pullfrog AI: Open-Source CodeRabbit Alternative Powered by GitHub Actions
items.original_summary: Pullfrog is an open-source AI-powered GitHub bot by Colin McDonnell, designed for automation in GitHub Actions. It supports a model-agnostic approach, allowing integration with various LLM providers. Key features include orchestration for pull request reviews, issue triage, and CI remediation, all managed within GitHub's environment. The tool operates with a bring-your-own-key model for access. By Daniel Curtis
items.chinese_summary: Pullfrog AI 开源发布，一个由 Colin McDonnell 开发的 GitHub bot，作为 CodeRabbit 的开源替代，基于 GitHub Actions 运行。差异点在于 model-agnostic（自带 key，集成任意 LLM 提供方）并支持 PR review、issue triage、CI 修复编排。已有 CodeRabbit 部署可考虑迁移或并存。
items.backend_focus: 可行动项：仓库加入 .github/workflows/pullfrog.yml，自带 LLM API key（注意 secrets 管理）；与现有 CodeRabbit 短期并行，逐步替换 review 逻辑。

items.title: Apple Launches Core AI for Apple-Silicon Optimized On-Device Generative AI
items.original_summary: At WWDC 26, Apple announced the Core AI framework, the official successor to Core ML. It is designed to allow developers to run large language models and generative AI entirely on-device, supporting both custom-converted PyTorch models and pre-optimized open-source models. By Sergio De Simone
items.chinese_summary: Apple 在 WWDC 26 发布 Core AI 框架，作为 Core ML 的官方继任者，支持在 Apple Silicon 上完全本地运行 LLM 与生成式 AI 模型，可加载自定义转换的 PyTorch 模型或预优化开源模型。差异点在于从「传统 ML 推理」升级为「端侧 LLM/GenAI 运行时」。对 iOS/macOS 应用是新接入点，现有 Core ML 集成需评估迁移。
items.backend_focus: 可行动项：升级 Xcode 与 SDK，import CoreAI 替换原 CoreML 路径；评估模型是否需要重新 convert（PyTorch -> Core AI 格式），关注 max_tokens、context window 在端侧硬件上的实际可用上限。

items.title: CircleCI Introduces Chunk Sidecars to Bring CI Validation Directly Into AI Coding Workflows
items.original_summary: CircleCI has launched Chunk Sidecars, a new capability designed to bring CI-style validation directly into an AI coding agent's inner development loop By Craig Risi
items.chinese_summary: CircleCI 推出 Chunk Sidecars，将 CI 验证能力直接嵌入 AI 编码 agent 的内部开发循环，使 agent 在写代码时即可获得 CI 反馈。差异点在于把 CI 从「提交后门禁」前移到「agent 实时反馈通道」。对使用 AI coding agent 的团队影响是新集成点。
items.backend_focus: 可行动项：在 .circleci/config.yml 启用 chunk sidecars；AI agent 端配置读取 sidecar 反馈（注意超时与重试策略），并把 flaky test 标记传递给 agent 以减少无效重试。

items.title: Anthropic Releases and Temporarily Suspends Claude Fable 5
items.original_summary: On June 9, 2026, Anthropic launched Claude Fable 5, a model designed for long-horizon tasks, but it was taken offline shortly after due to a U.S. government export directive. It shares architecture with Claude Mythos 5, supporting extensive token usage. The model includes mandatory data retention requirements, which have affected its deployment with partners like Microsoft. By Andrew Hoblitzell
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 发布 Claude Fable 5 后不久即因美国政府出口管制指令下线；该模型与 Claude Mythos 5 共用架构、面向长时任务、支持大量 token 调用，并带有强制数据保留要求。差异点在于「长上下文 + 强制留存」的合规特征。对原本计划接入 Fable 5 / Mythos 5 的系统需立刻回退。
items.backend_focus: 立即行动：把 claude-fable-5* / claude-mythos-5* 全部切到 Claude Opus 4.8；检查 max_tokens、context window 是否需要按 4.8 限额下调；关注 Anthropic 关于强制 data retention 的合规说明是否回滚。

items.title: Google Launches Colab CLI for Developers, Automation, and AI Agents
items.original_summary: Google has announced the Google Colab CLI, a command-line tool that allows developers and AI agents to interact with remote Colab runtimes directly from a local terminal. By Daniel Dominguez
items.chinese_summary: Google 发布 Google Colab CLI，一个命令行工具，让开发者与 AI agent 可从本地终端直接与远程 Colab 运行时交互。差异点在于把 Colab 从「Web/Notebook 入口」扩展到「CLI/Agent 入口」。对做 agent 编排或自动化 ML 流水线的团队是新工具。
items.backend_focus: 可行动项：pip install colab-cli，配置 gcloud 认证；agent 侧把 notebook 执行节点从自定义 Docker 切换到 colab cli <run>，注意 GPU 配额与 idle timeout 限制。

items.title: Pinecone Brings AI Agents Directly to Enterprise Data with Microsoft OneLake Integration
items.original_summary: Pinecone has announced a new integration between its Nexus knowledge engine and Microsoft OneLake, aiming to fundamentally change how enterprise AI agents access and reason over corporate data. By Craig Risi
items.chinese_summary: Pinecone 宣布 Nexus 知识引擎与 Microsoft OneLake 集成，让企业 AI agent 直接对接 OneLake 中的企业数据。差异点在于把 vector search 数据源从「自有存储」扩展到「OneLake 联邦查询」。对使用 Fabric/OneLake 存储数据的 .NET/Azure 团队可减少数据搬运。
items.backend_focus: 可行动项：评估将 OneLake 路径配置为 Pinecone Nexus data source，确认 IAM/Fabric 权限打通；如已有 ETL 同步链路，可逐步下线，由 Nexus on-demand 联邦查询替代。

items.title: Building and Scaling a Platform with Project-as-a-Service
items.original_summary: When a platform started with total developer autonomy, teams felt overwhelmed and ended up solving the same problems in completely different ways. The company shifted to enablement over support, working together with teams intensively, and helping teams feel confident and capable, turning the right way into being the easiest way. By Ben Linders
items.chinese_summary: InfoQ 案例文章：某平台团队从「完全开发者自治」转向「Project-as-a-Service」式的使能模式，通过密集协作让「正确做法」成为「最易做法」。这是组织工程实践文章，无具体工具/版本变化。
items.backend_focus: 营销大于实质，无需行动。可作为内部平台团队建设思路参考，不涉及 SDK/API/配置变更。

items.title: Article: Governing AI in the Cloud: A Practical Guide for Architects
items.original_summary: In this article, the author outlines a practical approach to AI governance in the cloud, covering discovery of shadow AI, data classification at creation, IAM-based enforcement, policy-as-code, and operational controls. The article shows how organizations can embed governance into delivery pipelines, balancing security, compliance, and developer productivity without relying on manual processes. By Dave Ward
items.chinese_summary: InfoQ 实践文章：作者给出云上 AI 治理的可执行路径，覆盖 shadow AI 发现、数据创建时分类、IAM 强制、policy-as-code 与运营控制。这是架构/治理方法论，没有新工具/版本。
items.backend_focus: 营销大于实质，无需行动。可作为 AI 治理设计参考，但 OpenAI / Anthropic / Azure 侧无 SDK/接口变化需跟进。

items.title: Article: Artificial Intelligence-Driven Phishing: How Phishing Technique Is Evolving and Implemented
items.original_summary: In this article, the author examines how AI is transforming phishing from a manual, targeted activity into an automated and scalable attack model. The article breaks down each stage of the phishing lifecycle, showing how AI improves reconnaissance, profiling, content generation, delivery, and interaction, while outlining layered defenses that combine controls, processes, and user awareness. By Marco Rizzi
items.chinese_summary: InfoQ 安全文章：作者解析 AI 如何把钓鱼攻击从「手工定向」变为「自动化可规模化」，逐阶段拆解侦察、画像、内容生成、投递与交互，并给出分层防御建议。这是安全研究文章，无厂商接口/版本变化。
items.backend_focus: 无
